name: Cisco AppDynamics Tools
description: MCP tools for managing and querying the Cisco Splunk Add-on for AppDynamics
author: cisco-appdynamics-setup skill

tools.name: cisco_appdynamics_check_health
tools.title: Cisco AppDynamics Health Check
tools.description: Check overall AppDynamics add-on health including configured controller accounts, enabled inputs, event counts, and last event time.
tools.spl: | rest /servicesNS/nobody/Splunk_TA_AppDynamics/Splunk_TA_AppDynamics_account count=0 | stats count as controller_accounts | appendcols [| rest /services/data/inputs/all count=0 | search eai:acl.app="Splunk_TA_AppDynamics" disabled=0 | stats count as enabled_inputs] | appendcols [| tstats count as total_events where index=appdynamics] | appendcols [| tstats latest(_time) as last_event where index=appdynamics | eval last_event=strftime(last_event, "%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S")]
examples: How many AppDynamics events are being collected?

tools.name: cisco_appdynamics_list_inputs
tools.title: AppDynamics List Inputs
tools.description: List all configured AppDynamics data inputs with their state and index.
tools.spl: | rest /services/data/inputs/all count=0 | search eai:acl.app="Splunk_TA_AppDynamics" | eval input_type=mvindex(split(title, ":"), 0) | table title, input_type, disabled, index, interval | sort title

tools.name: cisco_appdynamics_status_summary
tools.title: AppDynamics Status Summary
tools.description: Summarize high-level AppDynamics status events by entity type.
tools.spl: index=appdynamics sourcetype=appdynamics_status | stats count by source | sort -count
examples: What AppDynamics status data is arriving?

tools.name: cisco_appdynamics_events
tools.title: AppDynamics Events
tools.description: Show AppDynamics events and health rule activity by severity and rule name.
tools.spl: index=appdynamics sourcetype=appdynamics_events | stats count by severity, healthRuleName | sort -count
examples: Any critical AppDynamics health rule violations?

tools.name: cisco_appdynamics_security
tools.title: AppDynamics Security Summary
tools.description: Summarize Secure Application events by status and signature.
tools.spl: index=appdynamics sourcetype=appdynamics_security | stats count by status, signature | sort -count

tools.name: cisco_appdynamics_audit_log
tools.title: AppDynamics Audit Log
tools.description: Show recent AppDynamics controller audit activity grouped by user and action.
tools.spl: index=appdynamics sourcetype=appdynamics_audit | spath | eval user=coalesce(user,userName,username,principal), action=coalesce(action,auditAction,eventType,operation) | stats count by user, action | sort -count

tools.name: cisco_appdynamics_licenses
tools.title: AppDynamics License Usage
tools.description: Show AppDynamics license usage events by license source.
tools.spl: index=appdynamics sourcetype=appdynamics_licenses | eval license_type=case(source="appdynamics_abl_licenses","ABL", source="appdynamics_ibl_licenses","IBL", 1=1, source) | stats count by license_type | sort -count
examples: Which AppDynamics license feeds are active?

tools.name: cisco_appdynamics_ingestion_breakdown
tools.title: AppDynamics Ingestion Breakdown
tools.description: Show AppDynamics event counts by sourcetype to understand which input families are active.
tools.spl: index=appdynamics sourcetype=appdynamics_* | stats count by sourcetype | sort -count
